_comment: Codex CLI mounting for the AgentCorp hooks (same scripts as Claude Code's hooks.json; only the mounting differs). Install: copy or merge this file to <repo>/.codex/hooks.json (project) or ~/.codex/hooks.json (user), adjusting the paths to this plugin checkout. Codex has no SessionEnd event: capture runs via the Stop hook's state file plus the stale sweep in session-start (see hooks/codex-stop-capture). First run requires trust review via /hooks.
